positive: Minimalist, highly stylized vector illustration of a cosmic forest biome. The scene features bioluminescent flora and fauna, including stylized glowing mushrooms, intertwining crystalline vines, and abstract geometric representations of alien creatures. Use a palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric violet, and accents of luminous gold. The style should be clean linework with flat color blocking, achieving a 'cutout sticker' look. Composition must be centralized, creating a striking, highly contrast-rich silhouette suitable for screen printing on apparel. Emphasize symmetry and smooth, predictable edges. Background should be dark and atmospheric.
